import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def task_func(df: pd.DataFrame) -> tuple[pd.DataFrame, plt.Figure]:
    if df.empty or df.select_dtypes(include=np.number).columns.isin([np.int64, np.float64]).all() == False:
        raise ValueError("The DataFrame is empty or contains non-numeric data.")

    cumulative_sums = df.apply(lambda x: x.cumsum(), axis=0)
    cumulative_sums.fillna(0, inplace=True)

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    for col in cumulative_sums.columns:
        ax.bar(cumulative_sums.index, cumulative_sums[col], label=col)

    plt.title('Cumulative Sum per Column')
    plt.xlabel('Index')
    plt.ylabel('Cumulative Sum')
    plt.legend()

    return cumulative_sums, fig
